title: Social Control
html: Stub. Yahir's recurring lens: democratic states "give the illusion of choice to make the population fall in line," in contrast to authoritarian regimes that feel forced. Same incentive-structure-vs-stated-values move appears in 2021 12 04 capitalisms climate, 2022 10 11 happiness dystopia, and 2022 03 11 made people vote to prove voting is a farce only effective t.
